node.title: Uber | Software Engineer II | Bangalore | Compensation

article.title: Uber | Software Engineer II | Bangalore | Compensation
article.content:
College: Tier 2
Education: B.Tech (CSE) 2022 batch
Years of experience: 3.5 years
Prev Company: Product based company in observability space
Prev Comp: 30L Base

Company: Uber India Systems Private Limited
Title/Level: Software Engineer - II
Location: Bangalore
Salary: 40L
Company PF: 2.5L
Stock bonus: 50500 RSUs (44 L) 25% i.e. 11L p.a. monthly vesting
Bonus: 7L
Total comp (Salary + Bonus): 42.5L + 7L + 11L = 60.5L


---
